/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Maze.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Ghost.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/AStar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pacman.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o -o pacman  /usr/lib64/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib64/libSDL2-2.0.so.0.3200.64
